column1: # GIFNO-FDO-XT-LOGLO-POD sweep (depth-1 collapse default; encoder runs 1D-along-x).
# The encoder now collapses depth to the surface row by default
# (LOGLO_DEPTH_STRIDE=NZ_MAX): validated to match/beat full depth at ~11x
# throughput, ~34x throughput ceiling, and ~20x fewer params (2.88M).
# NOTE: LOGLO_PATCH_SIZE height is clamped to the encoder depth (=1 at the
# default), so only the patch WIDTH is active unless depth is restored.
# --- encoder sweep (patch width + HF noise; height is clamped to 1) ---
# --- depth ablation (confirm depth-1 still wins at full scale) ---
# --- capacity (cheap now that the model is tiny) ---
